testcase.name: TDD Validation: Feed Functionality After isLoading Fixes > VALIDATION 1: RealSocialMediaFeed renders without isLoading errors
TDD Validation: Feed Functionality After isLoading Fixes > VALIDATION 2: EnhancedPostingInterface receives isLoading prop correctly
TDD Validation: Feed Functionality After isLoading Fixes > VALIDATION 3: Feed components render without undefined variable errors
TDD Validation: Feed Functionality After isLoading Fixes > VALIDATION 4: isLoading prop handling prevents runtime errors
TDD Validation: Feed Functionality After isLoading Fixes > TDD SUCCESS: All isLoading variable issues resolved
